subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 14/26] server41tests: add test for RENAME event notifications

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite for RENAME event notifications. The test requests a directory delegation and then renames a file from a second client, verifying that the server sends a CB_NOTIFY with the correct RENAME event. The test checks for the presence of the notification and its contents to ensure correctness.
